qa_pairs.question: How do users start their Galaxy server on the Cedar cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To start the Galaxy server, users should navigate to https://gateway.cedar.computecanada.ca/ and click on the Galaxy link. They will then be prompted to log in using their Alliance account username and password, which will redirect them to their Galaxy server manager page.

qa_pairs.question: What are the methods for running tools in a Galaxy instance on Cedar, and which method is recommended for job submission?
qa_pairs.answer: There are two main ways to run tools in a Galaxy instance on Cedar: either locally on the gateway machine where the Galaxy server is installed, or by submitting jobs to the Cedar cluster. By default, jobs are submitted to the Cedar cluster, and running jobs on the gateway machine is not recommended due to its limited memory and inefficiency.
